data.title: CoinList to launch Obol token sale, offering 30% discount compared to latest VC round
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CoinList will start the Obol token sale at 1:00 am Beijing time on February 25, and it will be 30% cheaper than the most recent VC round of investment. For general users: FDV is $125 million, token price is $0.25, 33% unlocked 6 months after TGE, and then linearly unlocked in 12 months.
For wstETH or weETH holders: FDV is $115 million, token price is $0.23, 33% unlocked 6 months after TGE, and then linearly unlocked in 12 months. At the same time, users need to hold at least $20 worth of wstETH or weETH on CoinList between 1:00 am on March 4, 2025 and 1:00 am on March 11, 2025 to enjoy lower prices and FDV. The purchase limit for both options is a minimum of $100 and a maximum of $250,000. Users who are not selected to receive an allocation will receive the funds in their CoinList wallet by 1:00 AM on March 13, 2025.

data.title: A whale has withdrawn more than 174,000 SOL from Binance and pledged them in the past 4 days
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to OnChain Lens monitoring, a certain whale address withdrew about 174,767 SOL (worth approximately US$29.87 million) from Binance in the past 4 days, and used 174,705 SOL of them for staking.

data.title: Solana Price Prediction: Dead Or Just Resting After A 12% Drop?
data.description:
Solana price just hit a stomach-churning dip. A 12.3% plunge in seven days has traders buzzing—is this the end for the blockchain once dubbed an “Ethereum killer”? The numbers tell a tale of turbulence: Solana peaked at $290 only to crash to $170 within a month, per CoinGecko data. However, data and analysts suggest Solana […]
The post Solana Price Prediction: Dead Or Just Resting After A 12%...
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/02/20/solana-price-prediction-dead-or-just-resting-after-a-12-drop/

data.title: Ethereum Foundation wants a social media guru to help it ‘yap better’
data.description:
The Ethereum Foundation is seeking a social media manager to share the most pressing Ethereum ecosystem developments and stories on social media platforms like X.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ethereum-foundation-hiring-social-media-manager?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: BetaShares Launches New Bitcoin ETF In Australia
data.description: According to PANews, Australian ETF operator BetaShares has introduced a new Bitcoin ETF named QBTC. This ETF aims to provide investors with opportunities to invest in Bitcoin through Bitwise's BITB.

data.title: Shadow's trading volume in the past 24 hours surpassed Hyperliquid
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Sonic Ecosystem DeFi project Shadow posted on the X platform that the platform's transaction volume in the past 24 hours reached $252,856,099, setting a record high, surpassing Hyperliquid ($137 million), Berachain ($178 million), Avalanche ($96.1 million), and Polygon ($105 million).
According to the explanation of Andre Cronje, founder of Sonic Labs, SHADOW's project positioning and token model are x (3,3), which has been improved on the basis of ve (3,3). Coin holders do not need to lock positions to obtain fee income, and can get more incentives after locking xSHADOW.

data.title: FBI Director Kash Patel Holds $115,000 In Bitcoin
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. President Donald Trump's newly appointed FBI Director, Kash Patel, possesses Bitcoin valued at $115,000. This information was reported by WatcherGuru on February 21. The disclosure highlights the growing interest and involvement of high-profile government officials in cryptocurrency investments.

data.title: Nexus: Testnet II will be extended by one day
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Nexus posted on the X platform that Nexus Testnet II will be extended to 12:00 noon Pacific Time on Saturday, February 22 (extended for another day).

data.title: The price of KAITO once exceeded 2.1 USDT and is now at 1.53 USDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: OKX market data shows that the price of KAITO once exceeded 2.1 USDT this morning and is currently trading at 1.53 USDT, with a 6-hour increase of 28.81%.

data.title: Blockchain game Illuvium undergoes restructuring due to operational difficulties
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News NFT game project Illuvium reorganized and laid off employees due to poor business operations, and some core contributors chose to take pay cuts or receive wages in the form of tokens. Last year, Illuvium released three interrelated games: Overworld, Arena, and Zero, covering different game types, and the layoffs occurred at that time. Although Illuvium has a grand vision, after years of development, the community's response has not been very positive.
Co-founder Kieran Warwick admitted that the "concerns" about the gameplay of the series are reasonable and things must change. This includes Illuvium "substantially" reducing costs by adjusting such as setting a salary cap of $85,000. But this week, Warwick said that more drastic cuts must be made. (Decrypt)
